summary: Excellent Garden show highlighted by a rollicking Tennessee Jed and smoky Samson & Delilah bookends, though the recording source isn’t specified.
review: The reviewer describes this Garden performance as a sleeper hit, noting that the energy kicked in with a lively Tennessee Jed midway through set I and that set II featured strong “smoky” bookends like Samson & Delilah. Keyboardist Keith receives special kudos, and the overall enthusiasm earns a full‑star rating despite no comments on audio fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises the musical performance and Keith’s playing; lack of recording details keeps confidence low, but show quality drives a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any audio characteristics or issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Show started slowly, gaining momentum midway through set I with Tennessee Jed and delivering strong, smoky bookends in set II.
